stamps vOH at ctrl_out when any input is high (A=VDD, B=GND)
stamps vOH at ctrl_out when any input is low (A=GND, B=GND)
stamps vOH at ctrl_out when all inputs are low (A=GND, B=GND)
stamps vOH at ctrl_out when inputs differ (A=VDD, B=GND)
stamps vOH at ctrl_out when inputs are equal (A=VDD, B=VDD)
stamps vOH at ctrl_out when input is low (in=GND)
stamps vOH at ctrl_out when input is high (In_1=VDD)
count=1 after rising edge with en=1: ctrl_bit_0=VOH, ctrl_ovf=VOH (maxValue=1)
count=1 after rising edge with en=1, dir=0: ctrl_bit_0=VOH, ctrl_ovf=VOH
dir=1 (down) from count=1: after one down-count, count=0, ctrl_ovf=VOH
stores D=1 on rising edge with en=1: ctrl_bit_0=VOH
selects in_0 (VDD) when sel=GND, stamps vOH at ctrl_out
sel=GND, in=VDD: stamps vOH at ctrl_0 and vOL at ctrl_1
sel=VDD, in=VDD: stamps vOL at ctrl_0 and vOH at ctrl_1
sel=GND: stamps vOH at ctrl_0 and vOL at ctrl_1
sel=VDD: stamps vOL at ctrl_0 and vOH at ctrl_1
merge mode: in_0=VDD, in_1=GND stamps vOH at ctrl_0 (packed bits non-zero)
